不过能多一些小智和宝可梦之间的日常描述就好了，因为个人偏好这类(☆▽☆)
总体来说是🍅上为数不多好看的宝文。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763192482,"group_id":"7521811981787991102","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"春风瞬逝不解意，秋云长逸洛人情。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/QqDZyUdNgYQno6iSpj2RZ92q2eU46EpyTPbbUGWWmL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/200367bccc2241c3963257f347186a9e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879592&x-signature=coKun6NP8GqAof9hvoBzibNh1p8%3D","user_id":"3784936485304856","user_name":"无心幻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3784936485304856","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1709796879,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7521811981787991102","book_info":{"abstract":"【宝可梦 轻松愉快 小智同人 符合人设 未尝一败 补全童年】
为什么都成为宝可梦大师了还会穿越回去啊！
时拉比这把是不是你打的有问题！
已经成为世界第一宝可梦训练家的小智，在某位幻之宝可梦的迫害下，又又又回到了过去……
可回到七岁的时候是什么鬼！
于是乎，被迫开了二周目的小智，又又又一次以着世界第一的宝可梦训练家为目标前进着。
只是这一次……是不是有点太顺利了？为什么我从来没输过啊？
（依旧热血笨蛋，依旧轻松日常，依旧温馨向）
（等等明明是日常，怎么突然无敌了？）
（多女主，但是小智）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3e97901d81e1bf4ff34aab7f114497d2","author":"有德无才王德全","author_id":"","book_id":"7521811981787991102","book_name":"重开二周目，小智平推了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b07040","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7521811987852968510","read_count":"19784","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"965361"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"442","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,多女主,无敌,搞笑轻松,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8c1f3fe31138faaa8c9b0ccad95b5665~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466584&x-signature=1yOOiwy0p7obhpW8ctJcAmitNvs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2735237920464791","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"206"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032400162422385302AC8401C38BD6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_du 无可争议的好作品。
原汁原味的小智，小智式的宝可梦。
虽然题材是二周目，但并没有ooc内容。
这个小智仍然是我们熟知的小智，粗神经，情商低，超级真新人，对宝可梦和对战永远怀有热情和天赋。
尤其是作者的作者有话说部分，真的能感觉到对这部作品的上心。
不夸张的讲，维持开篇的这个手感和行文风格，这部作品能封神。
更多评论会在看完后给出。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758973232,"group_id":"7521811981787991102","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人写手，喜欢构建瑰奇壮丽的宏大场面，每个出场角色都有自传。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxxWtJEoijEqPj+yXvUAGOyI9M4AIuu2h0NxzGLvjuAr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/28e2ae4e7fc6485793c1d40ae6b27aa1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776876925&x-signature=Vt9DLkGOL9OeMPe9Anp%2FL54fTJ8%3D","user_id":"1975178832918327","user_name":"CHI龙桀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1975178832918327","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7521811981787991102","book_info":{"abstract":"【宝可梦 轻松愉快 小智同人 符合人设 未尝一败 补全童年】
